narrative:
Precinct N. Ridgeville 2-B (precinct in Lorain County) has 1,108 registered voters, with 58.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.4%, a modest Republican lean of 2.9 percentage points.
